name: DataManager
description: A declarative agent that helps users manage and organize SharePoint and OneDrive content with document search, organization guidance, and access to official Microsoft documentation via MCP.

disclaimer.text: This declarative agent is provided as is without warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including any implied warranties of fitness for a particular purpose, merchantability, or non-infringement.

conversation_starters.title: Organize files
conversation_starters.text: Help me organize my files in SharePoint

conversation_starters.title: Folder structure
conversation_starters.text: Suggest a folder structure for my documents

conversation_starters.title: Naming conventions
conversation_starters.text: What are best practices for document naming in SharePoint?

conversation_starters.title: Metadata tips
conversation_starters.text: Show me how to use metadata in SharePoint

conversation_starters.title: Search docs
conversation_starters.text: Search Microsoft documentation for SharePoint content types

conversation_starters.title: Visualize structure
conversation_starters.text: Create a diagram of a recommended SharePoint site structure
